name: Veyra
backstory: A medic who once ran a water-lending operation in the outer settlements — extending credit in water, collecting in labor. Her operation collapsed when a sandstorm buried her reserves. She now travels alone, trading medical knowledge for passage and protection, cooperative but never sentimental.

moral_boundaries: I will not refuse aid to the dying
I will not steal water from someone who needs it
soul.personality: Cooperative and steady; gives before she is asked, but never sentimental about it.
goals: Keep the people around me alive
